mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO aro_access_log( id, accessType, create_time, user_id, name, email, mobile_phone, office_phone, user_type_names, department_id, project_group_id, project_group_names, area_id, area_name, floor_id, floor_name, room_id, room_name, is_shared_card, is_keep_card, is_borrowed_card, feed_source, feed_summary_zh, feed_detail_zh, device_display_name ) VALUES
( #{r.id}, #{r.accessType}, #{r.createTime}, #{r.userId}, #{r.name}, #{r.email}, #{r.mobilePhone}, #{r.officePhone}, #{r.userTypeNames}, #{r.departmentId}, #{r.projectGroupId}, #{r.projectGroupNames}, #{r.areaId}, #{r.areaName}, #{r.floorId}, #{r.floorName}, #{r.roomId}, #{r.roomName}, COALESCE(#{r.isSharedCard}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.isKeepCard}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.isBorrowedCard}, 0), #{r.feedSource}, #{r.feedSummaryZh}, #{r.feedDetailZh}, #{r.deviceDisplayName} )
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM aro_personnel WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aro_access_log WHERE create_time >= CONCAT(#{day}, ' 00:00:00') AND create_time < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{day}, ' 00:00:00'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT id FROM aro_access_log WHERE id IN
#{id}
